lines.speaker: Unknown
lines.text: Mom will be back in an hour or two. You stay here.

lines.speaker: Unknown
lines.text: I never scanned my ID when I turned twenty-one.

lines.speaker: Unknown
lines.text: They don't know where I am. They can't track me.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Soldiers storm the town. Gunfire. People running.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: A woman falls. One gunshot. Silence.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Grandfather stands at the door. He looks broken.
